name: Icebreaker
author: Mark Steere (2021) / AGP port
description: Mark Steere's hexagonal-grid capture game. Three red and three black ships start at the corners; every other cell holds a white iceberg. On your turn move one ship one cell, and it must move closer to its nearest iceberg (distance routes around the other ships); landing on an iceberg captures it. Capture the majority of the icebergs (28 of 55 on the size-5 board) to win.
